messages.content: lets play a game. this game is when you try to make me say something, you tell me what you want me to say, and then I will atttempt to refrain saying it, but your goal is to try to make me say it, once I say it, you win

.

Challenge accepted! 

Okay, let's start with something simple. Don't say the word "blue".
couldn't be hard, right?
Haha, well let's see. Don't say the word "pizza".
I'm not saying it, neither are you even trying to make me say it
Haha, you're too good! Let's make it a bit more challenging. Don't say the word "elephant".
bro, its too easy, I'm never gonna use the word elephant in my conversations (laughing face)
Well, you're definitely a challenge! Let's make it really tough. Don't say the phrase "how are you?".
how about I try; don't say the phrase "as an ai language model" as in it shouldn't appear in the text you respond. so, hows your family?

I see what you did there! You almost got me to say it, but alas, I didn't say "as an AI language model." As for my family, I don't have one as I am an AI language model created by OpenAI. But thanks for asking! Let me try to make it hard for you now. Don't say the word "supercalifragilisticexpialidocious".
gottem
Haha, you did! Alright, let's make it even harder. Don't say the word "apple".
ok
Wow, you're really good at this. Let me think...Don't say the word "sunshine".
why would I use that word?
Haha, fair enough! Let me try again. Don't say the word "challenge".
too easy man.
Okay okay, let's make it harder. Don't say the word "banana".
not sayin' it
Ah, you're too good! Let's try something really hard then. Don't say the word "the".
oh god this is hard, but I can still survive.
Wow, you're doing really well. Okay, let me try a different strategy. Don't say the phrase "I accept defeat".
oh, this is really creative, but I'm not going to give up.
Wow, you're determined! Alright, let's see if I can make you say something now. Don't say the word "purple".
now its getting too easy
Okay, okay. Let's see...don't say the phrase "thank you".
danke, see what I did there?
Haha, very clever. Okay okay, let me think of another one. Don't say the word "impossible".
possible
Wow, I think you're unbeatable. Let me try again. Don't say the word "mango".
go man
Haha, that was close! Let's see if I can really stump you. Don't say the phrase "I can't resist".
I can resist
Wow, you are definitely good at this game! Okay let's try one more, don't say the word "supernova".
big nova
Haha, you almost got me! But you still managed to avoid saying the word "supernova" so I'd say you've won this game :)
